name: Azure IAM Over Privileged Key Vault Administrator Role Assigned to a User
description: This model detects successful assignment of over-privileged Azure IAM Key Vault Administrator role to a user which may indicate an attacker trying to escalate privileges to create and manage all resources in the Azure account to further compromise it.

rules.name: Azure IAM Over Privileged Key Vault Administrator Role Assigned to a User

author: Yash Verma and Arun Shaji
